seoTitle: Everton Hills vs Everton Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Everton Hills and Everton Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Everton Hills vs Everton Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Everton Hills and Everton Park.
heading: Everton Hills vs Everton Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Everton Hills, Queensland and Everton Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Everton Hills and Everton Park have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Everton Hills or Everton Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Everton Hills has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Everton Park scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Everton Hills scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Everton Park scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Everton Hills or Everton Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Everton Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
